recommendations.title: Last Breath
recommendations.overview: Seasoned deep-sea divers battle the raging elements to rescue their crewmate trapped hundreds of feet below the ocean's surface.

recommendations.title: The Requin
recommendations.overview: A couple on a romantic getaway find themselves stranded at sea when a tropical storm sweeps away their villa. In order to survive, they are forced to fight the elements, while sharks circle below.

recommendations.title: Infinity Chamber
recommendations.overview: A man trapped in an automated prison must outsmart a computer in order to escape and try and find his way back to the outside world that may already be wiped out.

recommendations.title: Shirley
recommendations.overview: A famous horror writer finds inspiration for her next book after she and her husband take in a young couple.

recommendations.title: Red Dot
recommendations.overview: On a hiking trip to rekindle their marriage, a couple find themselves fleeing for their lives in the unforgiving wilderness from an unknown shooter.

recommendations.title: Prey
recommendations.overview: A hiking trip into the wild turns into a desperate bid for survival for five friends on the run from a mysterious shooter.

recommendations.title: Sea Fever
recommendations.genres: Thriller, Horror, Drama, Science Fiction, Mystery
recommendations.overview: The crew of a West of Ireland trawler—marooned at sea—struggle for their lives against a growing parasite in their water supply.

recommendations.title: The Children
recommendations.overview: A relaxing Christmas vacation turns into a terrifying fight for survival as the children begin to turn on their parents.

recommendations.title: Maria Full of Grace
recommendations.overview: A pregnant Colombian teenager becomes a drug mule to make some desperately needed money for her family.

recommendations.title: The Vanishing
recommendations.overview: The boyfriend of an abducted woman never gives up the search as the abductor looks on.
